name: Mexican Cheese Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onions in a teflon-coated cast-iron pot until they are lightly browned or just beginning to burn.
2. Add flour, garlic, cream, and tomato paste when the onions are ready.
3. Stir until smooth and hot.
4. Gradually add grated cheese until bubbly.
5. Serve with tortilla chips.
